ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the property */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the property location */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "num_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "num_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "interest_level" TEXT /* Interest level of the property (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property type */,
  "property_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property status */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last property inspection */,
  "property_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property manager assigned to the property */,
  "listed_date" TEXT /* Date the property was listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_property_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_property_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_status_id") REFERENCES property_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_property_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the amenity belongs to */,
  "elevator" INTEGER /* Presence of elevator in the property */,
  "cats_allowed" INTEGER /* Allowance of cats in the property */,
  "dogs_allowed" INTEGER /* Allowance of dogs in the property */,
  "laundry_in_building" INTEGER /* Presence of laundry facilities in the building */,
  "fitness_center" INTEGER /* Presence of fitness center in the building */,
  "dishwasher" INTEGER /* Presence of dishwasher in the property */,
  "hardwood_floors" INTEGER /* Presence of hardwood floors in the property */,
  "roof_deck" INTEGER /* Presence of roof deck in the property */,
  "outdoor_space" INTEGER /* Presence of outdoor space in the property */,
  "dining_room" INTEGER /* Presence of dining room in the property */,
  "high_speed_internet" INTEGER /* Availability of high-speed internet in the property */,
  "balcony" INTEGER /* Presence of balcony in the property */,
  "swimming_pool" INTEGER /* Presence of swimming pool in the property */,
  "new_construction" INTEGER /* Indication of new construction */,
  "terrace" INTEGER /* Presence of terrace in the property */,
  "exclusive" INTEGER /* Indication of exclusivity */,
  "loft" INTEGER /* Indication of loft */,
  "garden_patio" INTEGER /* Presence of garden patio in the property */,
  "wheelchair_access" INTEGER /* Presence of wheelchair access in the property */,
  "common_outdoor_space" INTEGER /* Presence of common outdoor space in the property */,
  "parking_available" TEXT /* Availability of parking space */,
  "storage_space" TEXT /* Availability of storage space */,
  "pet_policy_details" TEXT /* Details of pet policy */,
  "outdoor_space_size" REAL /* Size of outdoor space (if present) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_amenities_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leases" (
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lease */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the lease belongs to */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tenant */,
  "lease_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the lease */,
  "lease_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the lease */,
  "rent" INTEGER /* Monthly rent */,
  "security_deposit" INTEGER /* Security deposit */,
  "lease_type" TEXT /* Type of lease (e.g., fixed-term, month-to-month) */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Status of lease renewal (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date of lease renewal */,
  "late_fee" INTEGER /* Amount of late fee */,
  "grace_period" INTEGER /* Grace period for late payments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leases_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leases_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tenants" (
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tenant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tenant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the tenant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the tenant */,
  "move_in_date" TEXT /* Date the tenant moved in */,
  "move_out_date" TEXT /* Date the tenant moved out */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of emergency contact */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the tenant */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Annual income of the tenant */,
  "reference_or_guarantor" TEXT /* Reference or guarantor for the tenant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., property manager, leasing agent, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor or manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance request */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the request is for */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tenant who made the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the request was completed */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_requests_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_requests_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_requests_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lease the payment is for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., check, credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, processed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_lease_id FOREIGN KEY ("lease_id") REFERENCES leases ("lease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the property status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rental_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental application */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the application is for */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tenant who applied */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date the decision was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_applications_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_applications_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
